questionHtml: Outline how the prickly pear cactus may become an ecological problem in Kruger National Park.
markschemeHtml:
1. they can become an invasive species because they lack predators
    OR
    uncontrolled population growth due to lack of predators;
  2. compete with local/endemic species for nutrients/habitat;
  3. may cause (endemic) species to become extinct/reduction in numbers;

meta.title: Outline how the prickly pear cactus may become an ecological problem in Kruger National Park.
